title: Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Finance Consulting Pvt Ltd!
